name: on_the_money
description: Opinionated, attribute-driven, standards-oriented modern framework. <2KB gzip. Native browser APIs only.

scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 src/core/*.test.js src/linter/*.test.js src/eslint/*.test.js src/stylelint/*.test.js test/integration.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --test-concurrency=1 --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=50 --test-coverage-branches=50 --test-coverage-functions=50 src/core/*.test.js src/linter/*.test.js src/eslint/*.test.js src/stylelint/*.test.js test/integration.test.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:coverage
